2138910.name: ATHEREON™: Advent I
2138910.description:
ATHEREON: ADVENT
■ Do you feel nostalgia?
■ Athereon is a blend of nostalgia meeting modernity
■ Athereon is a parallel universe, with the Advent series immersed in an epic fantasy open world strategy-tactical party-based RPG
■ Experience and be absorbed, where your wondrous spirit of imagination and adventure roams free ...
■ The Advent series takes place on planet Atherdora, civilization demarcated to 8 federations (8 stand-alone video games)
■ "ADVENT I" encompasses only the Halogrom Federation on the Atherdora map

FEATURES
■ Role-Playing Video Game
■ Genre: Fantasy
■ Mode: Single-Player
■ Party-Based
■ 3D Third-Person Perspective Stylized-View
■ 3D Tactical Turn-Based Battle-View
■ Strategy-Tactical Turn-Based Combat System
■ Character Class Group Architecture for Class Tier Hierarchy
■ Class Group: [15 Classes] Fighter
■ Class Group: [9 Classes] Mage
■ Class Group: [13 Classes] Psionite
■ Class Group: [17 Classes] Scout
■ Female and Male 3D Model Versions For Player Character Classes
■ Skin Tone Selection For Main Player Character Class
■ 100+ Music Tracks

OPEN WORLD ENVIRONMENT
■ Interconnection by an Overworld Infrastructure
■ Overworld Geolocation System
■ Travel by Land & Sea

EXPLORE
■ Atherdora (overworld)
■ Castles
■ Cities
■ Towns
■ Villages
■ Dungeons
■ Caves
■ Crypts
■ Mines
■ ... discover more

NOTES
■ Due to the vast universe of Athereon, the Advent series will be tentatively released as 8 stand-alone video games. Each release will be demarcated to 1 of 8 federations from planet Atherdora.
■ Please see the Athereon website for further information and details.
